caption: A person's hands are shown manipulating a protective plastic card slab in an indoor setting. In the initial stages, the hands hold the slab upside down, revealing a black, sparkling textured surface. As the sequence progresses, the slab is flipped over to reveal a sports trading card featuring a baseball player in a white uniform. The card is signed with a blue ink autograph and encased in a clear holder. In the background, a man wearing a dark blue polo shirt sits at a desk with equipment, including a monitor and various items on a black mat. The environment includes a colorful surface with green palm tree designs. Throughout the clip, a red and white logo is visible on the screen with the text "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" printed below it.
